companies.name: Skyline Design

departments.name: Architecture
departments.description: Responsible for designing structural blueprints and overseeing site development.

departments.name: Sustainability
departments.description: Ensures all projects meet environmental standards and LEED certification requirements.

departments.name: Client Relations
departments.description: Manages communication with city officials and private developers throughout the project lifecycle.

departments.name: Operations
departments.description: Oversees internal scheduling, resource allocation, and administrative logistics.

companies.backstory: Skyline Design is currently lead consultant for the Harbor District revitalization project, requiring intense coordination between urban planners and local government. The team is also preparing for a series of design audits and vendor negotiations to secure eco-friendly materials for upcoming residential builds.

companies.name: Everest Wealth

departments.name: Client Relations
departments.description: Manages individual client accounts and handles direct communication for wealth planning.

departments.name: Investment Research
departments.description: Conducts market analysis and selects assets for client portfolios.

departments.name: Operations
departments.description: Handles administrative tasks, account transfers, and internal software systems.

departments.name: Compliance
departments.description: Ensures all financial activities follow federal regulations and internal legal standards.

companies.backstory: Everest Wealth is currently undergoing a massive portfolio migration for its top-tier clients while preparing for their annual stakeholder summit. Internal teams are balancing intensive regulatory audits with weekly strategy sessions focused on emerging market opportunities.

companies.name: Crestview Legal

departments.name: Litigation
departments.description: Handles trial preparation, court filings, and dispute resolution for corporate clients.

departments.name: Corporate
departments.description: Manages mergers, acquisitions, and contract negotiations for business entities.

departments.name: Operations
departments.description: Oversees the firm's internal infrastructure, billing systems, and facility management.

departments.name: Client Relations
departments.description: Focuses on business development and maintaining long-term legal partnerships.

companies.backstory: Founded in 2008, Crestview Legal specializes in high-stakes corporate litigation and intellectual property disputes. The firm is currently managing a heavy calendar of discovery deadlines for a major tech merger and preparing for several upcoming depositions.

companies.name: Solaris Power

departments.name: Engineering
departments.description: Designs and optimizes photovoltaic system layouts and electrical grid connections.

departments.name: Operations
departments.description: Manages the day-to-day maintenance and monitoring of active solar installations.

departments.name: Sales
departments.description: Handles corporate power purchase agreements and municipal energy contracts.

departments.name: Project Management
departments.description: Coordinates site development timelines and construction vendor relationships.

departments.name: Compliance
departments.description: Oversees land use permits, environmental impact studies, and regulatory filings.

companies.backstory: Solaris Power is a leading developer of utility-scale solar farms focused on expanding sustainable infrastructure across the Southwest. The firm is currently coordinating the final grid integration of the Mesa Valley project while hosting stakeholder meetings for its upcoming high-efficiency battery storage initiative.
